title: Proclamation No. 705, s. 1960
text:
MALACAÑANG

RESIDENCE OF THE PRESIDENT OF THE PHILIPPINES MANILA

PROCLAMATION NO. 705

RESERVING FOR CERTAIN SPECIFIC PUBLIC PURPOSES OF THE NEW MUNICIPALITY OF POLOMOLOK, CERTAIN PARCELS OF LAND OF THE PUBLIC DOMAIN SITUATED IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF POLOMOLOK, PROVINCE OF COTABATO, ISLAND OF MINDANAO

Upon the recommendation of the Secretary of Agriculture and Natural Resources and pursuant to the authority vested in me by law, I Carlos P. Garcia, President of the Philippines, do hereby withdraw from sale or settlement and reserve for certain specific public purposes stated hereunder, subject to private rights, if any there be, certain parcels of land of the public domain located in the municipality of Polomolok, province of Cotabato, island of Mindanao, and more particularly described as follows:

Lot 2880 (Market site) Pls-209-D-19, sheet 1

(Under the administration of the municipality of Polomolok)

A parcel of land (Lot 2880 of Pls-209-D-19, Sheet 1), situated in the barrio of Polomolok, municipality of Buayan, province of Cotabato. Bounded on the NW., along line 1-2, by National Highway; and on the NE., SE., and SW., along lines 2-3-4-1, by road. Beginning at a point marked 1 oh plan, being N. 56° 13′ W., 11,565.40 meters from B.L.L.M. thence N. 45° 24′ E., 150.13 meters to point 2; thence S. 45° 18′ E., 194.92 meters to point 3; thence S. 45° 20′ W., 149.58 meters to point 4; thence N. 45° 27′ W., 195.14 meters to the point of beginning; containing an area of 29,227 square meters. All points referred to are indicated on the plan and marked on the ground by Cone. Cyl. Mons ; bearings true; date of survey, September 16-30, 1952.

Lot 2881 (Municipal building site) Pls-209-D19, sheet 1

(Under the administration of the municipality of Polomolok)

A parcel of land (Lot 2881 of Pls-209-D-19, sheet 1), situated in the barrio of Polomolok, municipality of Buayan, province of Cotabato. Bounded on the NW., along line 1-2, by National Highway; and on the NE., SE. and SW., along lines 2-3-4-1, by road. Beginning at a point marked 1 on plan, being N. 55° 25′ W., 11,532.63 meters from B.L.L.M. thence N. 46° 07′ E., 150.29 meters to point 2; thence S. 45° 23′ E., 78.01 meters to point 3; thence S. 45° 47′ W., 150.84 meters to point 4; thence N. 44° 59′ W., 78.83 meters to point of beginning; containing an area of 11,806 square meters. All points referred to are indicated on the plan and marked on the ground by Cyl. Cone. Mons.; bearings true; date of survey, September 16-30, 1952.

Lot 2882 (Public Plaza and play ground site) Pls-209-D-19, sheet 1

(Under the administration of the municipality of Polomolok)

A parcel of land (Lot 2882 of Pls-209-D-19, sheet 1), situated in the barrio of Polomolok, municipality of Buayan, province of Cotabato. Bounded on the NW., NE., SE. and SW., along lines 1-2-3-4-1, by road. Beginning at a point marked 1 on plan, being N. 55° 30′ W., 11,439.47 meters from B.L.L.M. 2, Pls-209-D-19, thence N. 45° 24′ E., 150.63 meters to point 2; thence S. 45° 13′ E., 100.61 meters to point 3; thence S. 45° 55′ W., 150.04 meters to point 4; thence N. 45° 33′ W., 98.75 meters to the point of beginning; containing an area of 14,942 square meters. All points referred to are indicated on the plan and marked on the ground by Cyl. Conc. Mons.; bearings true; date of survey, September 16-30, 1952.

Lot 2884 (Government employees quarters site) Pls-209-D-19, sheet 1

(Under the administration of the municipality of Polomolok)

A parcel of land (Lot 2884 of Pls-209-D-19, sheet 1), situated in the barrio of Polomolok, municipality of Buayan, province of Cotabato. Bounded on the NE., along line 1-2, by Lot 2885, Pls-209-D-19, sheet 1; on the SE., along line 2-3, by National Road; and on the SW. and NW., along lines 3-4-1, by road. Beginning at a point marked 1 on plan, being N. 55° 48′ W., 11,690.79 meters from B.L.L.M. 2, Pls-209-D-19, thence S. 46° 10′ E., 79.74 meters to point 2; thence S. 45° 19′ W., 61.05 meters to point 3; thence N. 45° 20′ W., 79.98 meters to point 4; thence N. 45° 33′ E., 59.91 meters to the point of beginning; containing an area of 4,830 square meters. All points referred to are indicated on the plan and marked on the ground by Cyl. Conc. Mons.; bearings true; date of survey September 16-30, 1952.

Lot 2886 (Hospital Site) Pls-209-D-19, Sheet 1

(Under the administration of the Director of Public Hospitals)

A parcel of land (Lot 2886 of Pls-209-D-19, sheet 1), situated in the barrio of Polomolok, municipality of Buayan, province of Cotabato. Bounded on the NW., NE. and SE., along lines 1-2-3-4, by road; and on the SW., along line 4-5, by lot 3214 and along line 5-1, by lot 3213, both of Pls-209-D-19, sheet 1. Beginning at a point marked 1 on plan, being N. 55° 42′ W., 11,803.24 meters from B.L.L.M. 2, Pls-209-D-19, thence N. 45° 14′ E., 90.10 meters to point 2; thence S. 45° 18′ E., 99.73 meters to point 3; thence S. 45° 09′ W., 90.24 meters to point 4; thence N. 45° 06′ W., 50.02 meters to point 5; thence N. 45° 20 W., 49.84 meters to the point of beginning; containing an area of 8,996 square meters. All points referred to are indicated on the plan and marked on the ground by Cyl. Conc. Mons.; bearings true; date of survey, September 16-30, 1952.

Lot 2887 (School site) Pls-209-D-19, sheet 1

(Under the administration of the Bureau of Public Schools)

A parcel of land (Lot 2887 of Pls-209-D-19, sheet 1), situated in the barrio of Polomolok, municipality of Buayan, province of Cotabato. Bounded on the SW., NW. and NE., along lines 1-2-3-4, by road; and on the SE., along line 4-1, by National Highway. Beginning at a point marked 1 on plan, being N. 55° 22′ W., 11,591.84 meters from B.L.L.M. 2, Pls-209-D-19, thence N. 45° 06′ W., 261.61 meters to point 2; thence N. 45°. 26′ E., 149.97 meters to point 2; thence S. 45° 04′ E., 261.62 meters to point 4; thence S. 45° 26′ W., 149.82 meters to the point of beginning; containing an area of 39,212 square meters. All points referred to are indicated on the plan and marked on the ground by Cyl. Conc. Mons.; bearings true; date of survey, September 16-30, 1952.

NOTE: All data are approximate and subject to change based upon approval of submitted survey Pls-209-D-19.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Republic of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done in the City of Manila, this 28th day of September, in the year of Our Lord, nineteen hundred and sixty, and of the Independence of the Philippines, the fifteenth.

CARLOS P. GARCIA President of the Philippines

By the President:

NATALIO P. CASTILLO Executive Secretary

Source: University of the Philippines, College of Law Library
